category_sources: Official GitHub repository at https://github.com/Adembc/lazyssh describes lazyssh as a terminal-based SSH manager inspired by lazydocker and k9s.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal-based SSH manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is Adembc/lazyssh.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents security behavior, installation, server management, search, and SSH config handling.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Adembc/lazyssh, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it wraps the system OpenSSH binary and reads/updates ~/.ssh/config.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal-based SSH manager.
